errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: An error occurred while rendering this component. This won't affect other parts of the app.

commands.emptyDescription: Select from presets on the left

confirm.clearMessage_one: Remove {{count}} command from the list? Your saved autoexec.cfg won't change until you click Save.
confirm.clearMessage_other: Remove all {{count}} commands from the list? Your saved autoexec.cfg won't change until you click Save.

launchOptions.description: Args passed to Deadlock when launched via Steam. Written into Steam's config right before grimoire launches the game.
launchOptions.saved: Saved. Applied next time you launch Deadlock via grimoire.
launchOptions.savedWillOverwrite: Your saved value will overwrite this on next grimoire launch.
launchOptions.steamConfigMissing: Steam config not found. Launch Deadlock via Steam once, then come back.
launchOptions.steamRunning: Steam is running. Close it before launching Deadlock via grimoire so the write isn't clobbered.
launchOptions.title: Launch Options

largerClickRadius.name: Larger Click Radius
largerClickRadius.description: Easier to click units on minimap

status.gamePathWarning: Game path not configured. Set it in Settings to save.

noPlayerSelected.title: No player selected
noPlayerSelected.description: Add a player from the dropdown in the top right to see their stats.

connect.launchingSteam: Launching Deadlock through Steam. Accept any Steam prompt to join.

empty.filtersDescription: Try clearing the search, region, or map filter.
empty.noneDescription: No Deadworks servers are currently registered. Check back later, or host one (server hosting requires Windows).

header.description: Browse and join Deadworks community dedicated servers.

warning.gamePathRequired: Set your Deadlock game path in Settings before joining a server.

actions.ignoreAllTitle: Move every active conflict pair to the Ignored section. Reversible per-pair via Unignore.
actions.ignoreTitle: Stop flagging this pair as a conflict

confirm.clearIgnoredHint: Pairs that still conflict will reappear in the active list after refresh.
confirm.clearIgnoredMessage: Every ignored pair will be restored to normal conflict detection.
confirm.disableMessage: {{name}} will be disabled and moved out of the addons folder. You can re-enable it from the Installed page.
confirm.ignoreAllHint: Reversible — you can restore any pair individually with Unignore.
confirm.ignoreAllMessage: Every currently active conflict pair will move to the Ignored section below.

empty.activeWithIgnored_one: No active conflicts. {{count}} pair currently ignored — see below.
empty.activeWithIgnored_other: No active conflicts. {{count}} pairs currently ignored — see below.

noConflicts.title: No Conflicts Detected
noConflicts.description: Your installed mods don't have any conflicts. Great!

errors.bothModsEnabled: Both mods must be enabled to set their load order.
errors.clearIgnoredFailed_one: Failed to clear {{count}} ignored pair. See console for details.
errors.clearIgnoredFailed_other: Failed to clear {{count}} ignored pairs. See console for details.
errors.ignoreFailed_one: Failed to ignore {{count}} pair. See console for details.
errors.ignoreFailed_other: Failed to ignore {{count}} pairs. See console for details.

header.noActiveDescription: No active conflicts — review or restore your ignored pairs below.

ignored.clearTitle: Restore conflict detection for every ignored pair
ignored.unignoreTitle: Restore conflict detection for this pair

reorder.enableBothHint: Enable both mods to set their load order.
reorder.hint: The mod that loads first overrides shared files. This sets the pair adjacent in load order.

language.label: Language
language.description: Choose the app language, or follow your system preference. Percentages show how much of the app each community translation covers.
language.downloadFailed: Could not download that language. Check your connection and try again.

gamePath.label: Deadlock Installation Path
gamePath.devModeActive: Dev mode is active. Deadlock path selection is disabled.
gamePath.selectHint: Select your Deadlock game folder (contains the 'game' directory)

gameinfo.title: gameinfo.gi Status
gameinfo.verifySteam: In Steam: right-click Deadlock > Properties > Installed Files > Verify integrity of game files.
gameinfo.foundNearby: Found nearby: {{candidates}}. Rename one to gameinfo.gi to restore.

updates.managed: Updates are managed by your package manager.
updates.managedPrefix: Grimoire was installed via a system package. Update with your distro's tools:
updates.installedDebSuffix: manually? Add the apt repository for automatic updates (instructions at

preferences.hideNsfwDescription: Blur thumbnail images for mods marked as NSFW.
preferences.switchVariants: Switch variants instead of stacking them
preferences.noSaltsYet: Nothing to contribute yet. Salts appear after you view matches in-game.
preferences.developerModeDescription: Use a dummy Deadlock directory for local testing without game files.
preferences.dateFormatDescription: How upload and update dates are shown on mods and files.

experimental.description: These features are still in development and may be incomplete or buggy.
experimental.statsDashboardDescription: Track your performance with data from the Deadlock Stats API.
experimental.crosshairDesignerDescription: Create custom crosshairs with a live preview.
experimental.socialDescription: Sign in with Steam to publish profiles and browse uploads from other players in Discover.

support.description: Found a bug or have a feature request? File an issue on GitHub or drop into our Discord.
support.bugReportDescription: Describe what went wrong, generate a sanitized report, then paste it into Discord or a GitHub issue. The report bundles app and OS info plus the tail of your log; home paths, Steam IDs, bearer tokens, and emails are stripped before it leaves the app.
support.includeFullLog: Include full log (up to 5 MB; Discord auto-attaches as a file)
support.reviewBeforeSharing: Review before sharing. Nothing is sent automatically.

setupWizard.resetResult: Setup wizard will show on next launch.
setupWizard.title: Reset Setup Wizard
setupWizard.description: Show the first-run setup wizard again on next app launch.
setupWizard.confirmMessage: The first-run setup wizard will appear the next time you launch the app. Your settings and installed mods are not affected.

cache.previewDescription: 3D model stills, hero portraits, and locker card thumbnails. These rebuild automatically from your installed mods when next viewed. Your installed mods are not affected.
cache.wipeMessage: Removes cached mod metadata and sync state. Browse re-syncs from GameBanana next time. Installed mods are not affected.
cache.clearPreviewMessage: Deletes cached preview images to reclaim disk. They regenerate when you next view them. Installed mods are not affected.

autoexec.title: Autoexec Configuration
autoexec.description: Ensure autoexec.cfg exists for crosshairs and commands.

toggles.hideOutdated: Hide Browse mods older than the current game version.
toggles.expandLocker: Start Locker list view with hero cards expanded.
toggles.switchVariants: Installing a new variant disables the old one. Off keeps both active. Updates always replace the old file.
toggles.enableAfterDownload: Enable mods as soon as they finish downloading. Stays disabled if no slot is free.
toggles.confirmProfileUpdate: Confirm before overwriting a profile's saved mods. Off overwrites immediately.
toggles.ignoreConflicts: Hide all conflicts from the Conflicts page. Off shows them.
toggles.discordRpc: Show your current Grimoire activity on your Discord profile. Talks only to your local Discord app and sends nothing to Grimoire.
toggles.contributeSalts: Share the replay keys Steam already caches for matches you view in-game. Sends only the match id, server cluster, and two download keys: no account id, no username, nothing about you or your mods.
toggles.fixUnknown: Match unknown local VPKs against GameBanana to recover names and thumbnails. May hit rate limits on large libraries.
toggles.deadworks: Add a Servers tab to browse and join Deadworks community servers. Required content downloads before connecting.
toggles.performanceConfig: One-click fps boost using Sqooky's community preset. Mods keep working. Remove any time.

actions.importTitle: Load your current in-game crosshair settings into the editor

alert.applyPresetFailed: Failed to apply preset. Make sure the game path is correct.
alert.clearFailed: Failed to clear crosshair. Check the game path in Settings.
alert.configureGamePath: Please configure your Deadlock game path in Settings first.
alert.noSettingsFound: No crosshair settings found in the game config. Change any crosshair setting in-game once, then try again.
alert.readConfigFailed: Failed to read the game config. Check the game path in Settings.

confirm.clearActive:
Remove the active crosshair from autoexec.cfg? Your saved presets will be kept.

Note: an in-progress game session keeps its current crosshair until you restart the game.

presets.deselectTitle: Remove the active crosshair from autoexec.cfg (presets are kept)

preview.description: Preview approximates the in-game crosshair at the selected resolution. Dynamic spread bloom is not simulated.
preview.pinTitle: Keep the mod manager window on top of the game for quick adjustments
preview.resolutionTitle: Render the preview at this display resolution's in-game size

toggles.staticGap: Keep the gap fixed. Off lets it expand with weapon spread (not shown in preview).
toggles.disableHeroCrosshairs: Force your custom crosshair on heroes that override it.

empty.noGamePath: Set your Deadlock path or enable dev mode.
empty.noMods: Download mods from Browse or import a custom VPK to get started.

empty.noGamePath: Set your Deadlock path or enable dev mode.

global.activeBadgeTitle: This soul container is active and loaded in-game
global.disabledBadgeTitle: This mod is disabled and not loaded in-game

trigger.label: Import Soul Container (GLB)
trigger.title: Import a soul container from a 3D model (.glb): orient it, preview it, and build a tracked local mod

dropzone.ariaBrowse: Drop a GLB here or press Enter to browse
dropzone.ariaSelected: GLB selected: {{path}}. Press Enter to change.
dropzone.prompt: Drop a .glb here, or click to browse
dropzone.previewEmpty: Drop a GLB to preview it fitted to the soul container.

preview.highPolyWarning: This model has {{count}} triangles, well above the {{threshold}} a soul container usually needs. It will still build, but a very heavy model can hurt in-game performance.

fields.name: Name
fields.notesPlaceholder: e.g. test build, source GLB notes

glow.label: Soul glow
glow.recolorHint: Tint the soul glow to the model's dominant color
glow.baseHint: Ship the stock gold glow unchanged
glow.offHint: Don't ship particles; base game glow plays

conflict.heading: A soul container is already enabled
conflict.body: Only one soul container loads in-game at a time (they override the same model). Choose what to do with “{{name}}”:

errors.noMeshGeometry: GLB preview loaded, but it has no mesh geometry.
errors.dropPathUnresolved: Could not resolve the dropped file path.

create.title: Create New Profile
create.placeholder: Enter profile name, e.g. Competitive, Casual

import.title: Import a portable profile from a share code or file

empty.title: No Profiles Yet
empty.noProfiles: Create a profile to save your current mod setup.

actions.updateTitle: Overwrite this profile with your current mods

snapshots.snapshotNowTitle: Capture your current installed mods now. Use this before experimenting.
snapshots.tooltip: Snapshots are automatic recovery points taken before updates or profile applies.
snapshots.collapsedEmpty: Automatic recovery points captured before updates or profile applies. None yet - one will appear here the next time you run either.
snapshots.expandedEmpty: Grimoire takes a snapshot of your installed mod set automatically before each mod update and before applying a profile. Restore re-downloads those mods from GameBanana, so a bad update or wrong profile can be rolled back. Snapshots store only mod IDs, not VPK files, so disk cost stays tiny. You can also capture one manually before experimenting.

explanation.preUpdate: Captured before a mod update changed your installed set.
explanation.preApplyProfile: Captured before applying a profile changed your installed set.
explanation.manual: Captured manually from the Profiles page.

snapshots.restoreTitle: Opens the import dialog with this snapshot preloaded

confirm.updateMessage: Overwrite {{name}} with your currently enabled mods? The profile's saved mod list will be replaced and can't be undone. To load this profile onto your install instead, use Apply. You can turn this prompt off in Settings -> Preferences.
confirm.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this profile? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteSnapshotMessage: Delete this recovery snapshot? You won't be able to restore from it later.
confirm.deleteSelectedSnapshotsMessage_one: Delete {{count}} snapshot? Your installed mods are unaffected. You won't be able to restore from the deleted snapshot later.
confirm.deleteSelectedSnapshotsMessage_other: Delete {{count}} snapshots? Your installed mods are unaffected. You won't be able to restore from the deleted snapshots later.

account.deleteMessage: Permanently deletes your account, your likes, and your published profiles from Discover. People who already imported them keep their copy.

importCollection.invalidId: Paste a collection URL or numeric id.
importCollection.pasteHint: Paste a GameBanana collection URL or id. Items queue like any Browse download.
importCollection.scanTitle: Fetch file lists and expand mods with variants
importCollection.noFiles: No downloadable files. This mod may have been removed.
importCollection.variantHint: Check a variant, or leave unchecked to use the most popular file.

importProfile.noFiles: No downloadable files. This mod may have been removed.
importProfile.variantHint: Check a variant, or leave unchecked to use the profile's pinned file.

mergeMods.strictDescription: Stop if two mods touch the same file. Off lets the higher-priority mod win.
mergeMods.localNote: Local mods merge fine but aren't in the share code. Delete the disabled originals and they can't be recovered on unmerge.

multiVpk.uncheckHint: Uncheck any you don't want to install.

welcome.autoexecExists: Existing autoexec.cfg found. Your settings stay intact.
welcome.autoDetectFailed: Auto-detect failed. Browse to your Steam library:

sidebar.updateAvailableTitle: Update available. Click to view release notes.

tooltip.installed: Mods currently in your Deadlock addons folder.
tooltip.browse: Discover and download mods from GameBanana.
tooltip.discover: Browse and import profiles published by other Grimoire users.
tooltip.servers: Browse and join Deadworks community servers.
tooltip.locker: Active cosmetic skins, organized by hero.
tooltip.autoexec: Console commands that run at game launch.
tooltip.conflicts: Mods that overwrite the same game files.
tooltip.profiles: Save and swap sets of enabled mods.

launch.noPath: Configure your Deadlock path in Settings first
launch.moddedStash: Restores stashed mods first, then launches Deadlock via Steam
launch.vanillaStash: A vanilla session is already active. Restore mods first.
launch.vanillaDefault: Temporarily stash mods, launch Deadlock via Steam, then auto-restore after the game starts

vanilla.collapsedTitle_one: Vanilla session active. {{count}} mod stashed. Click to restore now.
vanilla.collapsedTitle_other: Vanilla session active. {{count}} mods stashed. Click to restore now.

toast.restoreFailedRetry_one: Couldn't restore {{count}} mod. Make sure Deadlock is closed, then retry.
toast.restoreFailedRetry_other: Couldn't restore {{count}} mods. Make sure Deadlock is closed, then retry.
toast.restoreFailedRunning_one: Couldn't restore {{count}} mod. Is Deadlock still running?
toast.restoreFailedRunning_other: Couldn't restore {{count}} mods. Is Deadlock still running?
toast.stoppedRestoreFailed_one: Stopped Deadlock, but couldn't restore {{count}} mod.
toast.stoppedRestoreFailed_other: Stopped Deadlock, but couldn't restore {{count}} mods.
